source_name: Jobs and Skills Australia - energy and resources workforce outlook

fields.scope: Jobs and Skills Australia produces 5-year industry employment projections and the Skills Priority List. Energy transition workforce sits across multiple ANZSIC divisions.
fields.primary_source_document: Jobs and Skills Australia, Workforce Projections; Skills Priority List (annual).
fields.keying_plan: Key the 5-year projected growth percentage and the Skills Priority List flags for energy-relevant occupations (electricians, electrical engineers, mining engineers, geologists, wind turbine technicians).

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed JSA projections and skills-shortage flags. Workforce is the pinch point for the energy transition: rooftop solar electricians, transmission line crews and offshore wind technicians are all in shortage. Cite the report year keyed.
citation: Jobs and Skills Australia, Workforce Projections; Skills Priority List.
